errors.description: Device identity lifecycle, signature, policy, nonce, challenge, and revocation checks passed.
No governed device identity packet was supplied; execution remains blocked.
Device identity packet is missing required bounded fields or contains malformed metadata.
Device identity policy version does not match the expected runtime policy.
Device identity validity window has expired or is not yet current.
Device or public key fingerprint is revoked.
Device identity signature is missing, invalid, or not bound to the trusted public key fingerprint.
Device identity nonce has already been used or is stale.
Device identity challenge is missing from the active challenge set.
Device identity public key fingerprint is not trusted.
Trusted public key does not canonicalize to the packet public key fingerprint.
Device identity lifecycle validation failed closed.
